response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong senior-level software engineering fundamentals with 19 years of experience and excellent mentoring/architectural capabilities, they are fundamentally misaligned with this role. Their C++ experience is minimal (6 months in 2014-2015) with no recent work; the last decade has been JavaScript/TypeScript/Node.js focused. Critically missing are industrial automation domain knowledge, embedded systems background, industrial protocol expertise (Modbus, IEC standards, OPC UA), and any evidence of Secure Development Lifecycle or IEC 62443 compliance work—all core requirements for this position.
strengths: 19 years of senior/staff-level software engineering with proven architectural and mentoring capabilities across distributed systems and event-driven platforms
Strong fundamentals in testing, TDD, and code quality with pragmatic cross-functional collaboration demonstrated repeatedly
Some cloud platform experience (AWS CDK) and teaching/communication skills that could support team development
concerns: C++ expertise is minimal (6 months in 2014-2015) with no recent hands-on experience; last 10 years overwhelmingly focused on JavaScript/TypeScript and web technologies
No background in industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, or industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA); GISCollective and recent roles are web/cloud-focused
No evidence of Secure Development Lifecycle implementation, IEC 62443 standards compliance, or industrial cybersecurity experience—essential for this role
